# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: "3"
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: es
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
      - 9300:9300
    environment:
      - node.name=es
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - discovery.seed_hosts=kibana,logstash
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    ports:
      - 5000:5000
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - INDEX=my-index
      - LOGSTASH_FORWARDER_ENABLED=true
      - XPACK_MONITORING_ENABLED=true
      - XPACK_OPSMAN_HOSTED_ENABLED=false
    volumes:
      - logstash-pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://es:9200
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    volumes:
      - kibana-data:/usr/share/kibana/data

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.10.2
    container_name: apm-server
    ports:
      - 8200:8200
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://es:9200

volumes:
  elasticsearch-data:
  logstash-pipeline:
  kibana-data:
